title: corchorus leptocarpus
intro: Corchorus leptocarpus, also known as the Indian jute or bush jute, is a type of flowering plant in the mallow family Malvaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Corchorus leptocarpus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
